L.-33004/99 , 1935 nÂÂÂ +ÉÉÊvÉÉÊxÉªÉàÉ, 1993 (1993 BÉEÉ 73) BÉEÉÒ vÉÉ®É 31 (ÉÊxÉªÉÖÉÎBÉDiÉ BÉEÉÒ |ÉÉÊμÉEªÉÉ +ÉÉè® +ÉvªÉFÉ BÉEÉÒ ÂÂ (ÉÊxÉªÉÖÉÎBÉDiÉ BÉEÉÒ |ÉÉÊμÉEªÉÉ +ÉÉè® +ÉvªÉFÉ BÉEÉÒ +ÉcÇiÉÉAÆ) ºÉÆ¶ÉÉävÉxÉ ÉÊxÉªÉàÉ, ÉÊxÉªÉàÉ, 2012 BÉEä ÉÊxÉªÉàÉ 5BÉE àÉå, àÉn (ii) BÉEä {É® ´ÉäiÉxÉàÉÉxÉ 37,400 -67,000 âó{ÉA {ÉEÉ. ºÉÆ. 61-49/2003-<Ç<Ç-10] bÉì . +ÉàÉ®VÉÉÒiÉ ÉËºÉc, +É{É® ºÉÉÊSÉ´É ), iÉÉ®ÉÒJÉ 24 ºÉä 30 VÉÚxÉ, 2012 àÉå -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT (Department of School Education and Literacy) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd June, 2013 G.S.R. 351 (E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 31 of the National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 (73 of 1993), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the National Council for Teacher Education (Manner of Appointment and Qualifications of Chairperson) Rules, 2012, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the National Council for Teacher Education (Manner of Appointment and Qualifications of Chairperson) Amendment Rules, 2013. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Council for Teacher Education (Manner of Appointment and Qualifications of Chairperson) Rules, 2012, in rule 5, in clause (a), for item (ii), the following item shall be substituted, namely:— “(ii) a post in the pay scale of Rs. 37,400-67,000 plus grade pay of Rs. 10,000 with five years regular service in the grade in the parent cadre or department; and”. [F.No. 61-49/2003-EE-10] Dr. AMARJIT SINGH, Addl. Secy. Note : The Principal Rules were published vide G.S.R.159, dated 29th June, 2012 published in the Gazette of India (weekly), Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated June 24 to June 30, 2012.
